(13 of 1985), the• Central .Government. hereby specifics the. 2nd day. of March, 1987 as the date on and from which the Rations of sub-section (3) of section 14 of the said Act shall apply to the CentraL , :i Social Welfare Board, being an authority owned or controlled by Government, and makes the following amendments in the notification of{ the Government of India in the Ministry of Personnel, Public -- 2 of 3 -- 1 14111 '1 - 3(1 )1 darifircgr 3 Grievances and Pensions (Department of Personnel and Training) No, G.S.R. 730(E) dated the 2nd.
